title: Security Tools
description: Essential tools for network analysis, security testing, and monitoring
fullExplanation: Security tools help network administrators and security professionals analyze traffic, detect vulnerabilities, and monitor for threats. These tools are essential for both offensive security testing and defensive monitoring.
keyFacts: Wireshark captures and analyzes network packets in real-time
Nmap scans networks to discover hosts and services
Tools can be used for both security testing and attacks
Understanding tools helps both attackers and defenders
